comments.author: @bujin1977
comments.text: I've visited Galway (from Wales) every year for the last 18 years to visit a friend who lives there.  I really need to branch out a bit - hire a car and explore more of the country!  Some of it looks absolutely stunning.  Having said that this year's trip was just last weekend, and it was very cold and very wet!  I might wait until the winter for it to warm up a bit!  🤣
